title: ceiba jasminodora
intro: Ceiba jasminodora, also known as the Kapok tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceiba jasminodora include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Ceiba jasminodora is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
